inputs.label: Shaft Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the shaft between supports.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the shaft between supports.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge der Welle zwischen den Lagern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de l'arbre entre les supports.

inputs.label: Shaft Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the solid cylindrical shaft.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the solid cylindrical shaft.

inputs.label: Young's Modulus (E)
inputs.businessContext: Material's modulus of elasticity, e.g., steel ~210 GPa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material's modulus of elasticity, e.g., steel ~210 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin elastisite modülü, örn. çelik ~210 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Materials, z. B. Stahl ~210 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Module d'élasticité du matériau, ex. acier ~210 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Módulo de elasticidad del material, ej., acero ~210 GPa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل مرونة المادة، مثلاً الفولاذ ~210 جيجا باسكال.

inputs.label: Material Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the shaft material, e.g., steel ~7850 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the shaft material, e.g., steel ~7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mil malzemesinin yoğunluğu, örn. çelik ~7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Wellenmaterials, z. B. Stahl ~7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du matériau de l'arbre, ex. acier ~7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material del eje, ej., acero ~7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كثافة مادة العمود، مثلاً الفولاذ ~7850 كجم/م³.

inputs.label: Support Factor (C)
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless factor based on end conditions: π for pinned-pinned, 4.730 for fixed-fixed, 3.927 for fixed-pinned, 1.875 for fixed-free.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dimensionless factor based on end conditions: π for pinned-pinned, 4.730 for fixed-fixed, 3.927 for fixed-pinned, 1.875 for fixed-free.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uç koşullarına bağlı boyutsuz faktör: mafsallı-mafsallı için π, ankastre-ankastre için 4.730, ankastre-mafsallı için 3.927, ankastre-serbest için 1.875.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dimensionsloser Faktor basierend auf den Endbedingungen: π für beidseitig gelenkig gelagert, 4,730 für beidseitig fest eingespannt, 3,927 für fest-gelenkig, 1,875 für fest-frei.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur sans dimension basé sur les conditions d'extrémité : π pour articulé-articulé, 4,730 pour encastré-encastré, 3,927 pour encastré-articulé, 1,875 pour encastré-libre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor adimensional basado en condiciones de extremo: π para articulado-articulado, 4.730 para fijo-fijo, 3.927 para fijo-articulado, 1.875 para fijo-libre.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل بلا أبعاد يعتمد على ظروف النهايات: π للطرفين المثبتين، 4.730 للطرفين الثابتين، 3.927 للثابت والمثبت، 1.875 للثابت والحر.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
